name: bomlens
desc: BomLens — a local-first SBOM generator & open-source risk assessor (CycloneDX). Produce an SBOM, an open-source notice, and a security/license risk report from…
descFull: BomLens — a local-first SBOM generator & open-source risk assessor (CycloneDX). Produce an SBOM, an open-source notice, and a security/license risk report from source code, containers, binaries, firmware, or an SBOM you received. CLI or web UI, no SaaS.
